§r§7迷茫的时候，不妨抬头看看: §r§7When you're confusing, why not look up?
欢迎来到主世界……一个超乎寻常的主世界。在这个世界，植物不再生长，亡灵肆虐，阳光:
Welcome to the Overworld... or rather, what's left of it. The earth is barren, the undead run rampant, and the sun is choked by an endless storm……

You might wonder how the world you once knew descended into this nightmare.
到时候，你就能亲眼看见这场风暴——这场侵蚀世界，湮灭万物，撕裂地平线的终焉风暴…:
Now, you awaken deep within forgotten ruins, completely unarmed.

But you are a player, there is no limit in Minecraft, I believe you can easily get out of the predicament and return to the ground...
